summary: Verified TikTok verify-username fix + granular plan limits feature + auth/overlays regression. All 11 backend pytest tests PASSED. Frontend flows verified via Playwright: (1) TikTok input with 'mrbeast' shows green check + preview card 'MrBeast @mrbeast 129.100.000 seguidores'; (2) fake handle shows red X + 'Usuário @xxxxxx_fake_yyyy_12345 não encontrado'; (3) /admin → Painel Admin → Planos → Editar dialog displays all 6 new granular fields (Horas de live/dia, Overlays ativos, Scoreboards ativos, Minigames ativos, Mensagens IA/dia, Vídeos IA/mês) with -1=∞ hints; (4) PATCH persists new values verified via GET /api/admin/plans; (5) login + /api/auth/me regression OK; (6) /api/layouts (Overlay Studio backend) still returns 200.
critical_code_review_comments: Sidebar has a user-facing 'Planos' item (/plans pricing page) and admin submenu also labelled 'Planos' — could confuse admins. Consider renaming admin submenu to 'Gerenciar Planos'.
TikTok oEmbed public endpoint is unauthenticated and rate-limited by TikTok; consider caching successful responses for a short TTL to avoid hitting TikTok on every keystroke debounce.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Node backend at 127.0.0.1:8081 fronted by FastAPI at 8001 → public preview https://livestream-control-2.preview.emergentagent.com. Overlay Studio backend route is /api/layouts (NOT /api/overlays). Admin plans management is under /admin → sidebar 'Painel Admin' → 'Planos' (2nd occurrence of 'Planos' text). TikTok verify uses TikTok public oEmbed as primary source — works for real handles (mrbeast/charlidamelio/khaby.lame) returning nickname/avatar/followerCount. Admin user already has tiktokUsername='lariisimoesb' set from prior test; PATCH /api/auth/profile has weekly change limit.
